description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway with two parked cars, a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture, and a separate tree positioned near the house. The house has clean lines, a prominent balcony, and a partially covered outdoor dining area. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entrance is set back under a sheltered overhang, enhancing privacy and weather protection.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a paved driveway, and a furnished patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two parked cars, and the prominent balcony above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio with outdoor furniture and a separate tree, as well as the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the patio area, and the tree close to the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, cars, and the house's flat roof and geometric form.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under a flat overhang, minimalistic door, no visible steps or porch
